stimulus: The plant-based meat market, in which consumers purchase substitutes for traditional animal products, generated nearly $7 billion worldwide in 2020. Expecting continued growth, some analysts ______blank that revenues will more than triple by 2030.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical and precise word or phrase?
rationale: Choice B is the best answer because the analysts are making a claim about future revenue. "Predicted" means to state what will happen and matches this meaning. Choice A is incorrect because "worried" would suggest concern, not a forecast. Choice C is incorrect because the analysts are not making the revenue, only forecasting it. Choice D is incorrect because "denied" would contradict the expectation of growth.
